title: Personal website
subtitle: Astro site bolted onto BedRock. PR #1 draft. Self-discovery + self-presentation in one repo.

blocks.label: Draft PR open
blocks.text: **[#1 site: bolt Astro onto BedRock](https://github.com/Taylorblue123/BedRock/pull/1)** — home + /now + /projects. Build green. Privacy grep clean. Awaiting your review before merge + Vercel setup.

blocks.label: ⚠️ Truth correction
blocks.text: First draft pulled hero copy from `portfolio/portfolio-content.md` which claims a *CVPR 2026 first-author paper*. You flagged this as fake. **All mentions removed** from this PR (home, projects, /now). Stale sources (see R003) still contain the claim — follow-up PR can scrub those if you want.

blocks.markdown:
## What the PR ships

Three static pages on the Crumbs-inspired palette (ink / yellow / pink, Fraunces + Inter + JetBrains Mono, auto dark mode):

- **`/`** — hero + selected work + contact
- **`/now`** — weekly snapshot, Derek Sivers style
- **`/projects`** — featured + side + graphics demos + skills

## Privacy posture

- Astro reads only `site/src/**`
- `.vercelignore` belt + suspenders: excludes `context/`, `logs/`, `fact-sheets/`, `resumes/`, `ONBOARDING.md`, `INSTRUCTIONS.md`, `portfolio/*.md`, `portfolio/portfolio-site/`
- Build-output grep: 0 hits for private tokens

## Not done in this PR (deferred to you)

- Vercel project setup + domain pointing (your account + DNS)
- App icon / favicon / OG image (brand-defining)
- Scrubbing CVPR claim from the other stale sources (R003)
